name: The Back Nine Golf | Austin, TX - Westlake
address: 3801 N Capital of Texas Hwy D-160, Austin, TX 78746
about: The Back Nine Golf in Austin, TX - Westlake offers a high-end golf simulation experience for players looking to practice or enjoy a round in a modern setting. The venue features advanced simulator technology suitable for both casual play and serious practice sessions. Located in the Westlake area, it provides a convenient and accessible option for golf enthusiasts seeking an indoor activity without the need for a full course.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Convenient Westlake location for Austin-area residents
Versatile space suitable for both practice and social events
Private rooms available for focused sessions or group outings
Supports corporate events and leagues with dedicated facilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food options
Full bar with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue typically provides club rentals, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for the most accurate simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are generally not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and offers a kid-friendly environment suitable for junior golfers and casual play.
